nasb.text: The Lord God fashioned into a woman the rib which He had taken from the man, and brought her to the man.

esv.text: And the rib that the Lord God had taken from the man he made into a woman and brought her to the man.

cnv.text: 然後，耶和華　神用從那人身上所取的肋骨，造了一個女人，帶她到那人面前。

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝用那根肋骨造成一个女人，带到那人跟前。

csbs.text: 然后耶和华神用那人身上所取的肋骨，造出一个女人，并把她带到那人面前。
